name: bd-freelance-intake
description: ALWAYS USE THIS SKILL when a user asks for help with their Bangladesh taxes AND mentions freelancing, self-employment, sole proprietorship, IT/ITES exports, or being a business individual in Bangladesh. Trigger on phrases like \"help me with my Bangladesh taxes\", \"I'm a freelancer in Bangladesh\", \"I do IT export from Bangladesh\", \"file my NBR return\", \"I'm self-employed in Bangladesh\". REQUIRED entry point for the Bangladesh self-employed workflow — downstream skills (bd-it-freelancer-t
author: openaccountants
